title: Review bead introspection CLI implementation
description: Review the complete implementation of spec-df49daa7: parser additions, formatting helpers, command handlers, test suite, and CLAUDE.md update. Verify: (1) all 12 acceptance criteria from the spec are met; (2) no existing bead show / bead list behaviour is broken; (3) error handling matches spec exactly (exit codes, stderr messages, stdout silence on errors); (4) path resolver handles edge cases (empty path segment, deeply nested, mixed bracket+dot); (5) test coverage matches the 21-case Test Plan; (6) no security issues (e.g. no eval of path strings).
acceptance_criteria: All 12 spec acceptance criteria are satisfied
No regressions in existing bead show, bead list, or bead graph commands
Error handling for --field matches spec exactly: path-not-found exits non-zero with correct stderr; null/empty exits zero; array OOB exits non-zero with length
Test coverage covers all 21 spec test cases
Verdict: approved or needs_changes with specific findings
